summary: Vertical video. DHS public-engagement official Reade Abdelall delivers a selfie-style direct-to-camera message for National Child Abuse Prevention Month, with animated word-by-word captions and painted wood title cards ('National Child Abuse Prevention Month', 'Together, We Can Keep Our Kids Safe'). The video consists of continuous speech with no music track.
notable_text: Title cards 'NATIONAL CHILD ABUSE PREVENTION MONTH'; 'KIDS SAFE'; 'TOGETHER, WE CAN KEEP OUR KIDS SAFE'; caption 'THEY WORK 24 HOURS A DAY, SEVEN DAYS A'
